examples.html:
<basic.dropdown-button
  id="drop-buttons-1"
  size="large"
  btn-text="编辑"
></basic.dropdown-button>

<basic.dropdown-button
  id="drop-buttons-2"
  size="medium"
  type="primary"
></basic.dropdown-button>

<script>
  const dropButton1 = document.getElementById("drop-buttons-1");
  const dropButton2 = document.getElementById("drop-buttons-2");
  const actions = [
    {
      text: "第一项",
      icon: {
        lib: "antd",
        icon: "setting",
        theme: "filled",
      },
      disabled: true,
      event: "create",
    },
    {
      text: "第二项",
      icon: {
        lib: "antd",
        icon: "edit",
        theme: "filled",
      },
      event: "edit",
    },
  ];

  dropButton1.icon = {
    lib: "antd",
    icon: "right",
    theme: "outlined",
  };
  dropButton1.actions = actions;

  dropButton2.actions = actions;

  dropButton1.addEventListener("click", () => {
    console.log("click drop btn 1");
  });

  dropButton2.addEventListener("click", () => {
    console.log("click drop btn 2");
  });

  dropButton2.addEventListener("create", () => {
    console.log("click create btn");
  });

  dropButton2.addEventListener("edit", () => {
    console.log("click edit btn");
  });
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Document</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <containers.general-modal
      id="modal1"
      confirm-disabled="false"
      auto-close-when-confirm="true"
      modal-title="模态框-1"
      mask-closable="true"
    >
      这是一个模态框-1
      <basic.general-button id="btn2">打开模态框-2</basic.general-button>
      <containers.general-modal
        id="modal2"
        confirm-disabled="true"
        width="300px"
        modal-title="模态框-2"
        mask-closable="false"
      >
        这是一个模态框-2
      </containers.general-modal>
    </containers.general-modal>
    <basic.general-button id="btn1">打开模态框-1</basic.general-button>
  </body>
  <script>
    var modal = document.getElementById("modal1");
    var btn1 = document.getElementById("btn1");
    var btn2 = document.getElementById("btn2");

    btn1.addEventListener("click", () => {
      modal.open();
    });

    modal1.addEventListener("confirm", () => {
      console.log("modal confirm");
    });

    modal1.addEventListener("cancel", () => {
      console.log("modal cancel");
    });

    modal1.addEventListener("open", () => {
      console.log("modal open");
    });

    modal1.addEventListener("close", () => {
      console.log("modal close");
    });

    btn2.addEventListener("click", () => {
      document.getElementById("modal2").open();
    });
  </script>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Document</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <form.general-form id="form">
      <form.dynamic-form-item
        name="dynamic"
        label="动态表单"
        required="true"
        id="dynamic-form-item"
      ></form.dynamic-form-item>
      <basic.general-button id="submit-btn">提交表单</basic.general-button>
      <basic.general-button id="set-value-btn">设置默认值</basic.general-button>
    </form.general-form>
  </body>
  <script>
    const form = document.getElementById("form");
    const dynamicFormItem = document.getElementById("dynamic-form-item");
    const submitBtn = document.getElementById("submit-btn");
    const setValueBtn = document.getElementById("set-value-btn");

    dynamicFormItem.useBrick = [
      {
        brick: "form.general-input",
        properties: {
          name: "input",
          required: true,
        },
      },
      {
        brick: "form.general-select",
        properties: {
          name: "select",
          required: true,
          options: ["abc", "efg", "hij"],
        },
      },
    ];

    form.addEventListener("validate.success", (e) => {
      console.log("success", e);
    });
    form.addEventListener("validate.error", (e) => {
      console.log("error", e);
    });
    dynamicFormItem.addEventListener("change", (e) => {
      console.log("dynamic change", e);
    });

    submitBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      form.validate();
    });

    setValueBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      form.setInitValue({
        dynamic: [
          {
            input: "hello",
            select: "abc",
          },
          {
            input: "world",
            select: "efg",
          },
        ],
      });
    });
  </script>
</html>
